subject: docs(claude): sync CLAUDE.md with glow-props shared patterns
body:
Merge missing content from the glow-props CLAUDE.md into sun-sea-o:
- Added REMINDER blocks after each major section
- Added Triggers section (review, audit, docs, mobile, clean, performance, security, debug, improve, start)
- Added Suggested Implementations section (PWA system, debug system, app icons, PDF download)
- Enhanced Documentation section with detailed "What to include" and "Why" subsections
- Added missing AI note for sibling repo access via GITHUB_ALL_REPO_TOKEN
- Added missing prohibition against interactive input prompts
- Updated heading to include TRIGGERS
